en-us:
Meet KoBar, your ultimate multi-threaded desktop assistant. Designed for professionals, creators, and power users who value seamless workflows, KoBar is a highly customizable, modular utility sidebar that sits quietly on your screen until you need it.

It packs an incredible arsenal of productivity tools into a single, sleek interface. Supercharge your workflow with an OS-level AI Chat companion, a Snippet Vault for your most-used text and code, and an instant Color Picker. Manage your workspace effortlessly by tossing temporary files into the KoBox drop zone, or use the 'Pin to Top' feature to keep any crucial window locked above the rest. 

Alongside essentials like a powerful sequential clipboard, a quick app launcher, a focus timer, a floating calculator, and a smart screenshot tool, KoBar ensures everything you need is just a click away. Whether you are coding, designing, or managing your daily tasks, KoBar empowers your focus without cluttering your screen. Make it truly yours with deep customization options—from transparent glass themes to completely modular layouts.

Massive Productivity Update! We are thrilled to introduce powerful new tools and improvements to supercharge your workflow:

🚀 NEW FEATURES:
• 🤖 AI Hub: Your new OS-level AI companion! Connect with cloud models (Claude) or local LLMs to chat, analyze documents, and process images directly from your sidebar.
• 📝 Snippet Vault: Save, organize, and instantly copy your most frequently used text, code blocks, or email templates.
• 🕳️ KoBox (Drop Zone): A temporary blackhole for your files. Drag, drop, and declutter your screen instantly.
• 📌 Pin to Top: Keep any crucial application window locked above all others with a single click.
• 🎨 Color Picker: Instantly grab, save, and copy any color from your screen. A must-have for designers and developers.

✨ IMPROVEMENTS & FIXES:
• 🎨 Fresh New Look: We've updated the KoBar logo for a sleeker, more modern feel.
• 🛠️ Bug Fix: Resolved an issue that prevented KoBar from starting automatically on system boot.

Boost your productivity with KoBar: a highly customizable desktop sidebar featuring an AI Hub, Snippet Vault, KoBox drop zone, Color Picker, and Pin to Top, alongside essential tools like a sequential clipboard, focus timer, and quick shortcuts.

en-us: AI Hub (AI Chat): Your OS-level AI assistant. Chat with top cloud models (Claude) or local LLMs, analyze documents, and process images directly from your sidebar.
Sequential Clipboard: Copy multiple items into dedicated slots and paste them sequentially without losing your flow.
Quick Shortcuts: Drag and drop your favorite apps, folders, or games directly into the sidebar for instant access.
Pin to Top: Never lose sight of your most important work. Lock any crucial application window above all others with a single click.
Color Picker: Instantly grab, copy, and save any color from your screen. Build custom palettes to streamline your design and development workflow.
KoBox (Drop Zone): A temporary digital blackhole. Drag and drop files here to instantly declutter your workspace, complete with automatic cleanup options.
Snippet Vault: Your personal library for frequently used text, code blocks, or templates. Save them once, copy them instantly whenever you need them.
Total Layout Control: Drag and drop to reorder features in the settings. Your custom layout updates instantly on the sidebar.
Collapsible UI: Click the Eye icon to instantly shrink the bar out of your way when you need maximum screen real estate.
Glass & Solid Aesthetics: Choose between a classic 'Solid' look or a modern, transparent 'Glass' theme. Fine-tune the blur and glass opacity to match your desktop perfectly.
Focus Mode: A built-in timer to keep you locked in during uninterrupted deep work sessions.
Modular Interface: Turn individual features on or off. Hide the tools you don't use to create a compact, distraction-free sidebar.
Smart Auto-Hide Screenshots: Grab your screen with a single click. KoBar automatically hides itself during the capture for a clean, clutter-free image, then instantly reappears.
Floating Calculator: A quick-access calculator that stays above all your open windows and can be freely moved anywhere on your screen.
